summary: Add /reports page with HTML and JSON responses.
Add queued report export flow backed by monitor_job_runs and monitor_report_exports.
Add report_export worker handling plus CSV/PDF generation and manifest output.
Add migration and grants files for report exports and report permissions.
Extend verification and tests to cover reports page, report worker flow, report entrypoint and file generation.
rollback: Remove report-specific files added in this release.
Revert app/webapp.py, app/jobs/run_worker.py, app/templates/base.html, scripts/verify_patch.py and updated tests.
Do not apply app/sql/006_reports.sql or app/sql/006_reports_grants.sql on rollback targets.
